description_long: This object is a classic hot dog featuring a plump sausage nestled inside a soft, lightly browned bun. The sausage is topped with a generous squiggle of bright red ketchup, which runs the length of the hot dog. The bun appears fluffy and slightly glossy, with subtle shading that suggests a fresh, pillowy texture. The sausage is smooth and cylindrical, with a reddish-brown color and a slight sheen, indicating it is cooked. No grill marks or additional condiments are visible, and the hot dog is unwrapped, ready to eat. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of a street food snack found in urban parks or at food stands.
description: A plump sausage in a soft, lightly browned bun, topped with a squiggle of ketchup and no visible packaging.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the hot dog with ketchup on top and the bun cradling the sausage.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the sausage's rounded end and the zigzag pattern of ketchup.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the bun and ketchup from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Top-down view from the opposite end, again emphasizing the sausage tip and ketchup squiggle.
